case_title: JAMILAH C SANCHEZ VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA , INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, JAMILAH C AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA , INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, JAMILAH C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA , INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $11,197.71 PRINCIPAL, $126.24 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,693.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
